title: Types boolean(0,0) (bit) and bool(0,0) (bit) are not equal
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, flag INTEGER, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, flag, value) VALUES (1, 1, 10);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, flag, value) VALUES (2, 0, 20);
SELECT flag IS NULL FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (flag IS NOT NULL) FROM test_table WHERE value > 5;
key_bug_features: Boolean type comparison with isnull function
